title: Urostachys blepharodes

This genus is a part of the Liliaceae subfamily, also known as the lily family. The species Urostachys blepharodes is native to South America and is a type of terrestrial plant. Urostachys blepharodes is often found growing in moist environments, such as cloud forests and grasslands. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics, including its leaves and root system.
